articles.author: Justina Lee
articles.title: South Korea's Kospi tops 7,000 to hit a new high as Asia markets rise on Mideast de-escalation signals - CNBC
articles.description: Signaling diplomatic efforts for resolving the Middle East crisis were on track, Trump said the U.S. bid to guide ships out of Strait of Hormuz had been paused.
articles.content:
A man looks at a screen showing global stock market information on the street in Tokyo, Japan.
South Korea's Kospi hit another record Wednesday as Asia-Pacific markets saw a broad rally, tracking Wa… [+2211 chars]
